commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And be ready in the morning, and come up in the morning unto mount Sinai, and present yourself there to me in the top of the mount. From these expressions we might infer, that God gave the order first on Mount Sinai, and repeated it to Moses in the tabernacle, the night before he commenced his third fast and supplication of 40 days. (Haydock) After the first tables were broken, others were given; so after baptism we may obtain remission of sin by penance. Jerome, ad Dem. ) (Worthington).
